channel.title: Yu-Liang Wu
channel.description: Personal portfolio and research blog of Yu-Liang Wu, focusing on mathematics, dynamical systems, and ergodic theory.

item.title: Learning Julia
item.description: Workshop notes on programming in Julia — covering installation, basics, plotting, and advanced topics.

item.title: Advanced Topics
item.description: Advanced Julia — structs, multiple dispatch, and the type system.

item.title: Basics
item.description: Introduction to Julia fundamentals — variables, types, functions, and control flow.

item.title: Installation
item.description: Setting up Julia and the Pluto.jl interactive notebook environment.

item.title: Entropy of Markov-Cayley tree-shifts
item.description: Computing entropy of Markov-Cayley tree-shifts in Julia.

item.title: Spread model simulation
item.description: Implementing and simulating a spread model in Julia.

item.title: Tutorial 1
item.description: Tutorial 1: printing Pascal's triangle using basic Julia operations in Pluto.jl.

item.title: Tutorial 2
item.description: Tutorial 2: plotting figures and visualizing Markov-Cayley tree data.

item.title: Tutorial 3
item.description: Tutorial 3: building static sites with Franklin.jl.
